L1_headline: + SEM – John F. Duggan acquired 50,000 restricted stock shares. | 10/28/25
L2_brief: Executive Vice President John F. Duggan received a grant of 50,000 restricted stock shares at $0 cost on October 28, 2025. The shares vest in full on October 28, 2029 (4-year cliff vesting). This is a standard equity compensation award rather than an open-market purchase, reflecting ongoing executive retention incentives.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: This is a restricted stock grant with a 4-year cliff vesting period (vests October 28, 2029), indicating long-term retention compensation. The grant represents approximately 25% of Duggan's total post-transaction holdings, suggesting meaningful equity alignment with shareholders.
risks_flagged: Not an open-market purchase - equity compensation grant
